# Lim Chee Kin
> Senior Tech Lead, AI Engineer, and Solution Architect with 25+ years of software industry experience. Passionate about Open-Source AI and Data Sovereignty.

## About
Lim Chee Kin is a Senior Tech Lead, AI Engineer, and Solution Architect based in Malaysia. With over 25 years in the software industry, he specializes in AI/ML solutions, enterprise software architecture, and open-source development. His current focus is building privacy-first AI systems and bridging legacy infrastructure with modern AI capabilities.

## Core Skills
- AI & Machine Learning (RAG, LLM deployment, embeddings, voice AI)
- Python, Java, Spring, Micronaut, Flutter
- MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Oracle
- AWS, Docker, DevOps
- React, TypeScript, GraphQL

## Current Projects
- [RAG.WTF](https://www.rag.wtf/): An open-source platform for private, personalized knowledge discovery and management using RAG systems
- [Talk To AI](https://github.com/limcheekin/talk-to-ai): A real-time voice AI application for low-latency (<300ms) interactions, supporting local and cloud STT, LLM, and TTS services
- [Project Concord](https://github.com/limcheekin/project-concord): A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that connects modern AI agents with legacy database schemas
- [TelegramGPT](https://github.com/limcheekin/TelegramGPT): AI-powered Telegram bot for natural language conversations
- [open-text-embeddings](https://github.com/limcheekin/open-text-embeddings): Python library for open-source text embedding models

## Past Contributions
- [Fluwix](https://github.com/limcheekin/fluwix): Flutter showcase platform
- 10+ Grails Framework plugins for the developer community

## Work Experience
- 2021-Present: AI Engineer & Solution Architect (RAG.WTF & AI Initiatives)
- 2013-2020: Senior Java Tech Lead (DXC Technology)
- 2012-2013: Senior Java Tech Lead (Zurich Technology Services Malaysia)
- 2010-2012: Independent Software Professional
- 2008-2010: Senior Solution Consultant (Penril Datability)
- 2005-2007: Technical Lead (CMG Online)
- 2004-2005: Founder and Senior Consultant (Media Trend)
- 2002-2004: Software Engineer (Siemens Multimedia)
- 2001-2002: System Engineer (Online One Corporation)
- 1999-2000: System Engineer (Tee Yam Holding)
